zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Ann Marsham於大約1526年出生在英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦時，她的父親Robert Beet Marsham36歲，母親Sarah Elizabeth Downes32歲。她和William Drake Sr至少有9個兒子和13個女兒。她去世於1573年9月23日之前在英國艾可懷特 諾特利，埋葬在英國艾可懷特 諾特利。

nameMeanings.name: Marsham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Ann Marsham was born about 1526, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, her father, Robert Beet Marsham, was 36 and her mother, Sarah Elizabeth Downes, was 32. She had at least 9 sons and 13 daughters with William Drake Sr. She died before 23 September 1573, in White Notley, Essex, England, and was buried in White Notley, Essex, England.

Elle a eu au moins 9 fils et 13 filles avec William Drake Sr. Elle est décédée avant 23 septembre 1573, à White Notley, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à White Notley, Essex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Ann Marshamが約1526年にイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムで生まれた時，父Robert Beet Marshamは36歳，母Sarah Elizabeth Downesは32歳であった。彼女はWilliam Drake Srとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と13人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1573年9月23日以前にイギリスエセックスウィト ノトリーで死去し，イギリスエセックスウィト ノトリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Halifax St James, Halifax, Yorkshire, En: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 할이파스 스트 자메스
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Ann Marsham(이)가 대략 1526년 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Beet Marsham(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Elizabeth Downes(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 William Drake Sr(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1573년 9월 23일 이전 영국 에세스 휘트 노틀리에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 휘트 노틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Ann Marsham nasceu aproximadamente 1526, em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Beet Marsham, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Elizabeth Downes, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 13 filhas com William Drake Sr. Ela faleceu antes 23 de setembro de 1573, em White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.Halifax St James, Halifax, Yorkshire, En: хэлифакс ст джемесь, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Ann Marsham родилась около 1526 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Beet Marsham было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Elizabeth Downes, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 13 дочерей от William Drake Sr. Она умерла перед 23 сентябрь 1573 г. в местности уит нотли, эссекс, Англия и была похоронена в местности уит нотли, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Ann Marsham nació aproximadamente 1526, en Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Beet Marsham, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Sarah Elizabeth Downes, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 13 hijas con William Drake Sr. Murió antes de 23 de septiembre de 1573, en White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra.
